stem: A farm consists of a 7-hectare orchard and a 20-hectare pasture. The total number of trees on the farm is 3,500. The equation 7x + 20y = 3,500 represents this situation. Which of the following is the best interpretation of x in this context?

answerOptions.content: The total number of trees in the pasture
The total number of trees in the orchard
The average number of trees per hectare in the orchard
The average number of trees per hectare in the pasture

rationale: The coefficient of x is 7 (the hectares of orchard), so the term 7x gives the total number of trees in the orchard. That means x is the average number of trees per hectare in the orchard. Choice C is correct.
